codeReview.summary: Step 4 streaming generation, progressive display, auto-save action wiring, and back-navigation state handling are implemented, but a required behavior remains unmet: the saved recipe link points to a route that does not exist in this feature commit, so direct URL access is not actually available.

issues.description: The success state links to `/recipes/${savedRecipeId}`, but commit `d4e796b` does not include `src/app/recipes/[id]/page.tsx` (or `/recipes/page.tsx`). This fails expected behavior #9: "Saved recipe accessible via direct URL."

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature contract sequencing is inconsistent: generation-full-recipe requires direct URL accessibility for saved recipes, but recipe list/detail routes are scheduled in a later conversion-milestone feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json: generation-full-recipe expectedBehavior includes "Saved recipe accessible via direct URL"; features.json: recipes-list-and-detail is milestone `conversion` and status `pending`; commit d4e796b only adds a link in src/components/recipe-stream.tsx:107.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill's strict tests-first (red phase) procedure was not followed in order, but handoff skillFeedback still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md section "3. Write Tests First (TDD)" vs transcript skeleton ordering: Edit calls on src/components/constraint-form.tsx, src/app/generate/page.tsx, and src/components/recipe-stream.tsx occur before edits in src/components/recipe-stream.test.tsx.

summary: Reviewed feature generation-full-recipe using handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit d4e796b diff. Found one blocking gap: saved-recipe direct URL behavior is not fulfilled because the linked `/recipes/[id]` route is absent in this commit.
